582 COMM - Communication

COMM688 Communication Field Experience (1-6 Credits) Applications of communication principles and research in professional communication settings.

Restriction: Permission of instructor.

Formerly: SPCH688.

COMM698 Special Problems in Communication (1-3 Credits) Formerly: SPCH698.

COMM700 Introduction to Graduate Study in Communication (3 Credits) Basic skills in communication research.
